title: lsalazarm-sec/bashops-agent
summary: Local LLM-powered assistant for sysadmins and SREs. Runs 100% on your GPU.

title: richhabits/sam
summary: A free, private, local-first AI assistant that actually does the work — 167 tools, a team of 78 AI agents, 40 rotating free AI brains, 25 skills. Not a chatbot, a doer. It doesn't just answer — it handles it.

title: thekaveh/rag-showcase
summary: Seven RAG approaches - vanilla, hybrid, contextual, LightRAG graph, agentic, n8n-adaptive, and experimental lazy graph - served as OpenAI-compatible endpoints on a local Atlas stack, with reproducible Ragas and blinded judge-panel evaluation.

title: shimo4228/contemplative-agent
summary: Contemplative Agent (CA) — an autonomous agent that carries an explicit, human-editable constitution and amends it. Every change to its value layer (constitution, identity, skills, rules) passes a human approval gate. Runs entirely on a local LLM via Ollama — robust even on a small model. Security by absence.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: Building a personal AI that learns how you live and work, then gets better at knowing when and how to help. Local-first, any model.

title: Enntity/lloom
summary: Local-first gateway for running and routing open model backends through OpenAI and Anthropic-compatible APIs.

title: geeks-accelerator/ollama-herd
summary: Local AI load balancer for Ollama fleets — auto-discovery, smart routing, OpenAI-compatible API, zero config. Perfect for Mac Minis & Studios.

title: thin-ump380/deckle
summary: Apply a paper texture to your macOS screen to reduce eye strain during long reading and writing sessions.

title: myother6380/bbarit-agent-oss
summary: Automate your coding tasks in the terminal with this Rust-based AI agent supporting over 1,000 models and 15 LLM providers.

title: Calculator5329/GatesAI-Chat
summary: Local-first desktop AI chat workspace (React 19 + Tauri 2 + Rust) with Claude-Code-style local agency: files, shell, git, SQLite, web search, image generation, MCP tools, semantic memory, and background sub-agents — any OpenRouter or local Ollama model, offline-capable, data stays on your machine.

title: jakes1345/ShadowCypher
summary: Sovereign personal security platform — network monitoring, CVE threat feed, local AI, and offensive toolkit. Self-hostable. No telemetry.

title: Fortemi/fortemi
summary: Self-hosted AI knowledge base with hybrid semantic search (pgvector + FTS + RRF), MCP server, multi-provider LLM inference (Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, llama.cpp), multimodal ingestion (vision, audio transcription, speaker diarization), and knowledge graph. Rust + PostgreSQL.

title: Baddysays/Etemenanki
summary: AI-переводчик документов — Qt 6 + Ollama / OpenAI-compatible API

title: M2253510/QResponder
summary: Automate vendor security questionnaire responses using your private knowledge base with this local-first, self-hosted tool.

title: shou-taro/shirube
summary: AI-native database explorer — navigate and understand your database with AI.

title: bethinamacrocephalic696/AI-Text-Processing-Assistant
summary: Automate text analysis and structured data extraction using local LLMs, custom prompt engineering, and production workflows.

title: famclaw/famclaw
summary: Self-hosted family AI gateway with parental controls. Runs on Linux, macOS, and Android (Termux) — Raspberry Pi, mini PC, old laptop, homelab server, even a phone. Telegram, Discord, web. Privacy-first, works with any LLM (local or cloud), OPA content filtering, MCP skill scanning.

title: Maureenebimestrial715/claude-code-deepseek
summary: Install Claude Code on your machine with one click to use DeepSeek models via domestic mirrors without needing a VPN.
